fix1_sectionBackground.description: Removed section-wide dark-pattern background (now only on card halves)
fix1_sectionBackground.detail: FeaturedEvents.php now uses theme_block_props('featured-events') with no dark/bg-transparent! classes. Container div is 'container py-16' with no before: pseudo-element. Section element does not carry any background classes. ThemeHeading area renders on page background only — no dark band behind heading. PASS.

fix2_dateBadgePosition.description: Date badge repositioned inside inner image frame with 8px spacing
fix2_dateBadgePosition.detail: Date badge is now inside div.relative.w-full.h-full.overflow-hidden.rounded-xl.p-2 with classes 'absolute top-2 right-2' (top-2 = 8px, right-2 = 8px from inner frame edges). Selector confirmed found: true with count matching article count in every event-bearing section. Screenshots confirm badge is inset from the inner rounded frame. PASS.

fix3_cardBackgrounds.description: Card backgrounds changed from bg-charcoal to bg-dark-pattern
fix3_cardBackgrounds.detail: Both image half (md:w-1/2 bg-dark-pattern rounded-3xl p-4) and content half (md:w-1/2 bg-dark-pattern rounded-3xl p-6) use bg-dark-pattern. Page audit counts: 6 per 3-event section (2 per card × 3 cards), 4 per 2-event section, 2 per 1-event section — exactly 2 per card. No bg-charcoal classes remain on card halves. PASS.

fix4_arrowIcon.description: Arrow icon added to btn-tertiary CTA via theme_asset('images/tertiary-arrow.svg')
fix4_arrowIcon.detail: Card template uses inside .btn-tertiary, rendering an inline SVG (not an img tag). Page audit confirmed .btn-tertiary-arrow present in every event-bearing section with count matching btn-tertiary count. Screenshots show arrow icon alongside button text. PASS.

fix5_fontSizes.description: Day number to 40px (text-[2.5rem]), event title to 48px (text-header-2)
fix5_fontSizes.detail: Day number span: class 'font-heading text-[2.5rem] leading-[1.1]' — 2.5rem = 40px. Event title h3: class 'text-header-2 uppercase' — typography.css confirms --text-header-2: 3rem (48px) at base, scales to --text-6xl at larger breakpoints. Both match specified sizes. PASS.

fix6_venueNames.description: 3 tribe_venue posts seeded and associated with test events via _EventVenueID
fix6_venueNames.method: Page audit link text + venue-p selector
fix6_venueNames.detail:
Venue names now appear in rendered link text: 'Indie Game Developers Summit Rogers Arena', 'Virtual Reality Expo 2026 Rogers Arena', 'Summer Gaming Fest 2026 BC Place Stadium', 'E-Sports Championship Finals 2026 January Vancouver[...]', 'Global Gaming Convention 2025 Vancouver Convention C[entre]'. Venue

selector (article .md:w-1/2.bg-dark-pattern p:nth-child(2)) confirmed found: true in all event-bearing sections, count matching article count. PASS.

build.detail: taktician_validate_all passed. 0 build errors, 0 lint errors in FeaturedEvents files. 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks — unchanged from prior runs.

registration.detail: block.json valid. No changes to attributes or file references.

tsxPhpSync.detail: validate_all sync checks all pass: no $attributes[] extraction, docblock present, attribute usage consistent, context consistent, className inside blockProps correct, no redundant null coalescing, all PHP functions exist. Root wrapper mismatch warning is the known false positive (standard Gutenberg fragment pattern).

venueRendering.detail:
Venue names confirmed in rendered output. PHP uses get_post_meta($event_id, '_EventVenueID', true) then get_the_title($venue_id) — conditional on non-empty $venue_id. All 5 seeded events now have associated tribe_venue posts. Venue

present in all event-bearing sections.

dateBadge.detail: Date badge absolute-positioned at top-2 right-2 (8px) inside inner image frame (.relative.rounded-xl). Badge bg-charcoal retained (correct — contrast against dark-pattern image background). Date text format unchanged: day-of-week (D), day number at text-[2.5rem]/40px (font-heading), month year. aria-hidden='true' retained.

cardBackgrounds.detail: Both card halves use bg-dark-pattern. Confirmed via DOM selector (.bg-dark-pattern) with correct count (2 per card). Screenshots show textured dark card surfaces in both image and content panels.

sectionBackground.detail: Section wrapper carries no background or dark-pattern classes. Container has no before: pseudo-element. ThemeHeading area (eyebrow, h2, description) renders on plain page background. Dark pattern is scoped to card halves only.

arrowIcon.detail: .btn-tertiary-arrow span present in every event-bearing section. theme_asset() renders inline SVG (correct pattern — no external img request, avoids CSP issues, inherits currentColor). Arrow dimensions: w-5 h-4 (20×16px), SVG fills container via *:w-full *:h-full.

fontSizes.detail: text-[2.5rem] = 40px for day number (font-heading weight). text-header-2 = 3rem/48px base (confirmed in typography.css: --text-header-2: 3rem). Both match the specified sizes in the fix description.

responsiveLayout.detail: 375px screenshot: cards stack vertically (image above content), date badge visible inside image frame at top-right. 1440px screenshot: side-by-side layout, image and content halves at md:h-[349px]. No overflow at either viewport.

noRegressions.detail: All checks from previous PASS run (functional-qa-2026-02-19-193352) remain passing: HTTP 200, no JS errors, no overflow, correct event counts per variation, future ASC / past DESC ordering, postsLimit honored, buttonLabel passthrough, hideIfEmpty, correct permalinks, images with srcset/lazy/dimensions, heading hierarchy.

passedChecks: TSX/PHP sync validated — all checks pass
Section-wide dark background removed — ThemeHeading on plain page background
Date badge inside inner image frame at top-2/right-2 (8px from frame edges)
Both card halves use bg-dark-pattern (2 per card confirmed by DOM count)
Arrow icon (.btn-tertiary-arrow) renders as inline SVG on every event CTA
Event title font size: text-header-2 = 3rem/48px (confirmed in typography.css)
Venue names rendering: Rogers Arena, BC Place Stadium, Vancouver Convention Centre visible in link text

Venue

present in all event-bearing sections, conditional hidden when no venue
No regressions from prior PASS — all event card, ordering, postsLimit, buttonLabel checks still pass
